page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6r.xlarge is an ARM64-based general-purpose instance powered by a dedicated 2.8 GHz Ampere Altra processor. It features 4 physical cores with 1 thread per core, delivering 4 dedicated vCPUs. The instance is equipped with 16 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio. It operates on the KVM hypervisor, provides a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps, and does not include local storage or GPU hardware.

Performance benchmarks indicate average CPU capabilities, with stress-ng single-core scoring 1789.99 and multi-core scoring 7136.84. Large-block memory bandwidth is average, yielding 50.64 GB/sec for read operations and 29.82 GB/sec for write operations, though small-block cached read bandwidth is weak at 283.98 GB/sec. The instance exhibits lower performance in cryptographic tasks, with a PassMark encryption score of 649.99, and weak results in PassMark physics and memory tests.

This server represents a qualitatively cost-efficient option for ARM64 architecture testing and development due to its dedicated physical core allocation. It is well-suited for general-purpose workloads, lightweight multi-threaded applications, basic database operations, and static web serving, but is less optimal for high-throughput caching or intensive cryptographic processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6r.xlarge is an ARM64 general-purpose server featuring a dedicated 2.8 GHz Ampere Altra processor with 4 physical cores and 4 vCPUs. It is equipped with 16 GB of RAM, KVM virtualization, and a 1 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, with no local storage or GPU. Benchmark data shows average CPU performance in stress-ng tests and average large-block memory bandwidth, alongside weaker performance in cryptographic and small-block memory operations. This instance is a qualitatively cost-efficient choice for ARM64 software development, basic database tasks, and general-purpose web serving.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6r.xlarge is an ARM64 general-purpose server featuring a 4-core Ampere Altra processor, 16 GB RAM, and 1 Gbps network bandwidth, suitable for lightweight database and web workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6r.xlarge is an ARM64 server with 4 dedicated Ampere Altra cores, 16 GB RAM, and 1 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.
tagline: An ARM64-based general-purpose instance featuring dedicated Ampere Altra cores and balanced memory for lightweight multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a dedicated 2.8 GHz Ampere Altra ARM64 processor with 4 physical cores.
Equipped with 16 GB of system memory and 1 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.
Delivers average CPU performance in stress-ng and large-block memory bandwidth tests.
Lacks local storage and GPU acceleration, relying entirely on network-attached storage.
Best suited for ARM64 application development, basic database operations, and light web serving.
